raw.subject: Your Veteran-owned Food Truck in Jefferson City
raw.body:
Hi,

I noticed that your commitment to serving scratch-made meals from your food truck really shines through in the photos you share. It's great to see you supporting the community in Jefferson City.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it harder for customers to find and order from your truck.

I sketched out a simple homepage idea that brings together your menu hero, hours block, and some of the great photos you share on Facebook. It's a starting point, but I thought it could be a good way to give customers a clear sense of what you offer.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/hall-s-kitchen-jefferson-city

This is just a starting point, but I thought it could be worth exploring further. Building a site like this is a straightforward project, and I'd be happy to discuss details with you - let me know if you'd like to chat.

Reply or give me a quick call to get started.
